sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80395" key="pelagismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πελᾰγ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">being at sea</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
